pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 8, failing to leverage Java 11 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with Java 11-only libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or run on Java 11 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace removed javax.annotation module.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation was removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using @Generated or other annotations will fail to compile without this dependency.
